x.bio:
A bunch of nerds making progress toward open source AI
https://t.co/vrD0aDJeto

tweets.text:
Hermes now has an optional skill for tldraw offline, @tldraw's desktop whiteboard.

It reads your open canvas, edits it live, and can embed a script in the file so the drawing opens with working buttons and state.

> hermes skills install optional-skills/creative/tldraw-offline https://t.co/3JbJ6KDnG5

x.name: Deedy Das
x.bio:
Partner at @MenloVentures. Investor: Anthropic, OpenRouter, Modal, Wispr, Inception, Goodfire, PrimeIntellect

prior: Glean, Google Search. Cornell CS.

tweets.text:
OpenRouter when raising Seed (Jan ‘25) were at 2T tok/mo.

At Series A (Apr ‘25) at 8T tok/mo. 4x in 4mos.

At Series B (Feb ‘26) at 50T tok/mo. ~6x in 10mos.

Now (July ‘26) at 250T tok/mo. 5x in 5mos.

125x in 18mos. 

Many Router products now, but this was ahead of its time. https://t.co/2KXZ1HzPay

Flux 3 is a frontier video gen model at Seedance 2 / Gemini Omni caliber. It can do ~20s of video, with audio.

And it seems to be the only startup to be at the frontier of video. https://t.co/5OOoeabGlG https://t.co/1no4nKzYT0

70% of the users of most of these apps are, unsurprisingly, women.

Eventually they monetize by hooking users and making them pay for new episodes
